modes.name: House Points
modes.description: Students contribute points to a team instead of only competing individually.

modes.name: Reading Relay
modes.description: Teams unlock checkpoints by completing stories or reading sets.

modes.name: Conversation Cup
modes.description: Teams earn points from conversation completions and mastery growth.

modes.name: Strategy Showdown
modes.description: Testing groups earn points from strategy scenarios and timed rounds.
